arts.sum: Last week, we covered claims from Germany which stated Borussia Dortmund goalkeeper Gregor Kobel is on Chelsea’s radar. Bild now provide more on the west London club’s interest in the 27-year-old. Chelsea have been chasing the stopper for a long time and are hoping he would make a switch to Stamford Bridge next year. arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Shamrock Rovers Conference League clash predicted with another goal-frenzy result
arts.sum: Chelsea have the chance to end the Conference League league phase with a 100% winning record when they take on Irish side Shamrock Rovers later today. Shamrock Rovers will be desperate for three points though, with a win securing the Irish side's spot in the knockout stages.

arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Shamrock Rovers – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea conclude their Europa Conference League league phase campaign against Shamrock Rovers this evening. The Blues take on Irish opposition for the first time in Europe, in what will be a huge occasion for the visitors at Stamford Bridge.
